= [[Minigames]] =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|2048}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Beat the Treasure Monster}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Biochem Crisis}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Breach Firewall}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|ByeCube}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Cheese or Love}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Civilization Boom}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Devourer (Minigame)}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Explosive Cube}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Floral Flight}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Fruit Frenzy}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Game Promoter}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Hardly Poker}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|It Takes 5}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Master Decoder}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Minion Chore Game}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Pet Pig Restaurant}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Polar Klotski}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Pyramid Card}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Save Kim Chi-yum}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Solitaire}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Snail Arena}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Snail Flip}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Snail Quiz - Cathay}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Snail Quiz - Yamato}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Suspicious Game Cartridge}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Tablet Maze}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Taichi Fish Diagram}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Tetromino Special}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Unknown Game Cartridge}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Unlimited Space}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Unlimited Space 2}}
|}

= Minigame Accessories =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Golden Drazgul Fang Skin}}||{{RewardIconWithText|Fruit Frenzy}}
|}

[[Category:Icons]]
[[Category:Minigames]]
